title: senecio pubescens
intro: Senecio pubescens, also known as woolly groundsel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio pubescens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of conditions such as arthritis and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Senecio pubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
